title: Dr. Izzy's Musical Cure
summary: When a patient arrives with a painful earache, Dr. Izzy performs a thorough examination using her medical tools. After confirming the severity of the soreness, she skips traditional medicine and prescribes a specialized treatment of music to aid the recovery.

transcript.text: Oh, I have a sore ear.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: You have a sore ear? Okay. Well, Dr. Izzy will take a look.
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: No, the blue one's the earoscope.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What did you see, Dr. Izzy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I saw that it really was like a bit... definitely needed to come... definitely. Can you remember that one thing?
Yeah, the ears were really sore.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh yeah, sore ear. What treatment do you recommend?
transcript.speaker: Dad

characters.name: Dr. Izzy
characters.description: The dedicated physician at the animal hospital who treats Buddy, wielding a specialized blue earoscope with practiced precision to diagnose her patients.

characters.name: The Patient
characters.description: An individual suffering from a severe and persistent earache.

places.name: The Doctor's Office
places.description: A medical setting where patients receive examinations and unique prescriptions.
